python_rules.reason: API may depend only on its own implementation namespace and shared contract packages.
Worker may depend only on its own implementation namespace and shared contract packages.
MCP must stay inside its own namespace or shared contract packages; runtime crossings happen over HTTP/contracts.
Shared packages must stay pure and self-contained.

frontend_rules.reason: Web may import only web-local aliases/relative paths and must not reach into sibling apps or repo packages by file path.

package_purity_rules.reason: Contracts must remain schema-only and free of runtime side effects or environment coupling.
